---
title: Tentative Program
---

**Date**: October 13, Monday  
**Time**: from 2:15 pm to 5:45 pm  
**Location**: room HH

</br>

+---------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|Time (Espoo, Finland local time) | Event                                                                                                        |
+=================================+==============================================================================================================+
|14:15 - 14:30                    | Opening and Welcome                                                                                          |
+---------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|14:30 - 15:20                    | Keynote #1: [Simone Fischer-Hubner](https://www.kau.se/forskare/simone-fischer-hubner) - Karlstad University |
+---------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|15:20 - 15:45                    | Paper presentations                                                                                          |
|                                 |                                                                                                              |
|                                 | - Blue Mondays and Happy Meals: Investigating the impact of Contextual Factors on Mood States                |
|                                 | - MakOne: Behavioural Data of University Students’ Smart Devices in Uganda                                   |
+---------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|15:45 - 16:15                    | Coffee break                                                                                                 |
+---------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|16:15 - 17:05                    | Keynote #2: [Özlem Durmaz Incel](https://ozlemdurmazincel.github.io/) - University of Twente                 |
+---------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|17:05 - 17:40                    | Discussion and brainstorming among attendees and workshop organizers                                         |
|                                 |                                                                                                              |
|                                 | Potential topics                                                                                             |
|                                 |                                                                                                              |
|                                 | - experience working with DiversityOne                                                                       |
|                                 | - potential future analysis and applications                                                                 |
|                                 | - additional datasets                                                                                        |
+---------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|17:40 - 17:45                    | Closing remarks                                                                                              |
+---------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

: {.striped .hover}
